question_template: Is the speaking rate above {threshold} WPM? Answer yes or no.
Is this utterance spoken at least {threshold} words per minute?
Would you say the speaking rate is under {threshold} WPM? Answer yes or no.
Is the speaker talking more slowly than {threshold} WPM?
Does this sample exceed {threshold} WPM in speaking rate?
Is the estimated speaking rate no more than {threshold} words per minute?
Is the speaking rate faster than {threshold} WPM? Answer yes or no.
Would this count as slower than {threshold} WPM in terms of speaking rate?
Does the speaking rate fall in the interval [{lower}, {upper}) WPM?
Is the speaking rate between {lower} and {upper} WPM? Answer yes or no.
Is this speaking rate within the normal range of 120 to 170 WPM?
Is this speaking rate outside the normal 120–170 WPM band?
Would this be considered fast under the rule fast > 170 WPM?
Would this be considered slow under the rule slow < 120 WPM?
Using the rule slow < 120 WPM, normal = 120–170 WPM, and fast > 170 WPM, which category does this speaking rate belong to?
answer_template: {'slow' if WPM < 120 else 'normal' if WPM <= 170 else 'fast'}

question_template: Classify the speaking rate as slow, normal, or fast using the thresholds 120 and 170 WPM.
answer_template: {'slow' if WPM < 120 else 'normal' if WPM <= 170 else 'fast'}

question_template: Which tempo class fits this utterance: slow (<120 WPM), normal (120–170 WPM), or fast (>170 WPM)?

question_template: Choose the correct speaking-rate category: (A) slow (<120 WPM), (B) normal (120–170 WPM), or (C) fast (>170 WPM).
answer_template: {'(A)' if WPM < 120 else '(B)' if WPM <= 170 else '(C)'}

question_template: Is the speaking rate below the normal band, inside it, or above it?
answer_template: {'below normal band' if WPM < 120 else 'inside normal band' if WPM <= 170 else 'above normal band'}

question_template: For this clip, is the speaking rate best described as slow, normal, or fast? Use slow < 120 WPM, normal = 120–170 WPM, and fast > 170 WPM.
answer_template: {'slow' if WPM < 120 else 'normal' if WPM <= 170 else 'fast'}

question_template: Compared with the average speaking rate of 173 WPM, is this utterance slower, faster, or exactly equal?
answer_template: {'slower' if WPM < 173 else 'faster' if WPM > 173 else 'exactly equal'}

question_template: Is the speaking rate above or below the reference point of 173 WPM? If it matches exactly, answer equal.
answer_template: {'above' if WPM > 173 else 'below' if WPM < 173 else 'equal'}

question_template: Is this speaking rate closer to 120 WPM or 170 WPM? If equally close, answer equal distance.
answer_template: {'120 WPM' if abs(WPM - 120) < abs(WPM - 170) else '170 WPM' if abs(WPM - 170) < abs(WPM - 120) else 'equal distance'}

question_template: Relative to the midpoint of the normal band, 145 WPM, is the speaking rate below it, above it, or exactly at it?
answer_template: {'below 145 WPM' if WPM < 145 else 'above 145 WPM' if WPM > 145 else 'exactly 145 WPM'}

question_template: Is the speaking rate closer to the lower end (34 WPM) or the upper end (387 WPM) of the observed range? If tied, answer equally close.
answer_template: {'34 WPM' if abs(WPM - 34) < abs(WPM - 387) else '387 WPM' if abs(WPM - 387) < abs(WPM - 34) else 'equally close'}

question_template: Is the speaking rate nearer to the slow threshold (120 WPM) or the fast threshold (170 WPM)? If tied, answer equal distance.
answer_template: {'120 WPM' if abs(WPM - 120) < abs(WPM - 170) else '170 WPM' if abs(WPM - 170) < abs(WPM - 120) else 'equal distance'}

question_template: How many WPM away is this speaking rate from 170 WPM? Round to the nearest whole number.
By how many words per minute does this sample differ from the average rate of 173 WPM? Round to the nearest whole number.
What is the signed difference between this speaking rate and 170 WPM? Use a positive value if it is faster and a negative value if it is slower. Round to the nearest whole number.

How far is this speaking rate from the normal band [120, 170] WPM? Answer 0 if it is inside the band; otherwise give the minimum distance to the nearest band boundary, rounded to the nearest whole number.
answer_template: {0 if 120 <= WPM <= 170 else round_half_up(min(abs(WPM - 120), abs(WPM - 170)), 0)} WPM

answer_template: {'slow side of normal band' if 120 <= WPM <= 145 else 'fast side of normal band' if 145 < WPM <= 170 else 'outside normal band'}
